summary: Renames four fn_XXXXXX placeholder symbols in the HSD PObj subsystem (PObjAmnesia, PObjRelease, HSD_PObjResolveRefsAll, HSD_PObjLoadDesc) to verified A-tier names, propagating the rename through symbols.txt and the extern declarations/call sites in the two source files that reference them.
decomp_lessons: Renaming a fn_XXXXXX symbol requires updating symbols.txt AND every extern forward-declaration and call site across all TUs that reference it, not just the defining file.
Pure symbol-naming PRs don't change objdiff match percentage/progress numbers, only readability.
smart_moves: Batched multiple verified HSD PObj names into a single small PR instead of one-off renames, keeping the change reviewable.
naming_conventions: HSD PObj lifecycle functions named PObjAmnesia/PObjRelease (short verb-object) while public API entry points keep the HSD_PObj* prefix (HSD_PObjResolveRefsAll, HSD_PObjLoadDesc).

key_files.role: Renamed 4 fn_XXXXXX entries to verified HSD PObj names
Updated extern decl and call sites for HSD_PObjResolveRefsAll and HSD_PObjLoadDesc
